outbox.subject: 🎓 Welcome to AI Mastery, Refactor Test!
outbox.body:
Hi Refactor Test,

Welcome aboard! Your personal AI learning journey starts now.

You have a personal AI coach that will hand-hold you through the entire program — answering questions, giving you scenarios and materials, and recommending exactly what to learn next based on your goals.

🎁 Your first 3 coaching sessions are on us.

Start here: http://localhost:4321/learn

— The AI Mastery team

journey.summary: Asked: One sentence: what is Day 1 about?

coachSessions.title: One sentence: what is Day 1 about?

messages.content: One sentence: what is Day 1 about?

Day 1 is about the world *before* Transformers — the problem everyone was stuck on (cramming an entire sentence's meaning into a single fixed-size "thought vector" with seq2seq/LSTMs, which choked on long inputs) and why the 2017 paper "Attention Is All You Need" was such a thunderclap.

Since the cohort is on Day 1 right now and you're aiming to **ship an AI feature**, your best next step is to actually start Day 1 — the seq2seq bottleneck is the "bug report" that makes everything later click for a QA mindset. Want a quick worked example of that bottleneck to kick it off?
